overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a dystopian urban environment. The player moves from a shanty camp area through a street crossing, past a massive neon-lit ferris wheel structure, and continues along a residential sidewalk with palm trees and houses.

scene_state.functional_zone: shanty camp walkway with makeshift tents and debris

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a makeshift tent camp, passing by food stalls and scattered debris

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red clothing walking toward camera through the camp

entered.detail: weathered canvas tents and temporary shelters lining the left side of the path
large vertical billboard displaying colorful anime-style character art
scattered trash, wooden pallets, and discarded materials along the walkway
makeshift food vendor stalls with awnings and cooking equipment
metal security fence with barbed wire topping running along the left side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow shanty camp walkway with makeshift tents and debris scattered around. The camera moves forward past food stalls on the left, with a large digital billboard visible in the distance ahead. A pedestrian in red clothing walks toward the camera through the camp area.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with futuristic vehicle traffic

events.description: crossing the asphalt street between parked and moving futuristic vehicles
turning right to align with the main street sidewalk direction

agents.ego_description: crossing the road and navigating around vehicles to reach the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: blue and white futuristic car parked at the curb
black car driving along the street through the intersection

entered.detail: sleek cyberpunk-style vehicles with curved bodies and neon accents
painted white zebra stripes on the asphalt road surface
low-rise commercial structures with signage and storefronts
tall palm trees lining the street in the distance
modern street lamp posts with dual fixtures

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the enclosed camp to a wide-open urban intersection. The camera crosses the asphalt street between futuristic vehicles, then turns right to follow the main road. Commercial buildings line the left side while palm trees are visible in the distance, and the digital billboard shifts to the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: main commercial street with massive neon ferris wheel landmark

events.description: approaching and passing the large neon-lit ferris wheel structure on the right
curving left around the ferris wheel base and continuing along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the main street sidewalk, passing parked cars and navigating around the ferris wheel structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair and white shirt walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive circular amusement structure with purple and pink neon lighting
tall futuristic skyscrapers with reflective glass facades in the distance
row of parked futuristic vehicles along the left curb

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds along a wide commercial street with parked cars on the left. The massive neon ferris wheel dominates the right side of the frame, growing larger as the camera approaches. Modern glass towers rise in the distance ahead. The camera curves around the ferris wheel base, passing a pedestrian with red hair, as palm trees line the left side of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with houses, fences, and palm trees

events.description: passing a pedestrian walking ahead on the residential sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing along the residential sidewalk with houses on the right and the street on the left

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with backpack walking ahead on the sidewalk, then stepping aside

entered.detail: single-family homes with wooden siding and fenced yards
poured concrete wall supporting the raised residential properties
blue photovoltaic panels installed on a rooftop
rocky hills and elevated terrain visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions to a residential area with houses and fences lining the right side of the sidewalk. The neon ferris wheel disappears behind as the camera moves forward. Palm trees and utility poles line the path, with rocky mountain terrain visible in the distance. The camera passes a pedestrian with a backpack walking ahead, continuing along the quiet residential street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped, makeshift shanty camp into a sprawling neon-lit urban center that eventually settles into a quiet residential district. It begins by navigating a narrow walkway cluttered with tents and food stalls, moving past a pedestrian in red toward a distant digital billboard. As the camera emerges from the camp, the scene opens into a wide asphalt intersection filled with futuristic vehicles before turning right to follow a commercial road lined with palm trees. The perspective then shifts toward a massive, glowing neon ferris wheel that dominates the frame as the camera curves around its base and passes modern glass towers. Finally, the urban density fades as the camera moves past residential houses and fences, continuing along a sidewalk under utility poles toward rocky mountains in the distance.
